name: Vestand Inc.
business: Vestand Inc., operating as Yoshiharu, is a fast-growing Japanese restaurant operator specializing in ramen, sushi, and other Japanese cuisine. It operates restaurants primarily in Southern California and Las Vegas, serving customers through dine-in, takeout, delivery, and catering.

exposures.sentence: We are a fast-growing Japanese restaurant operator and was borne out of the idea of introducing the modernized Japanese dining experience to customers all over the world.

catalysts.sentence: In addition to the strategies stated above, we expect to initiate sales of franchises in late 2024 or early 2025.

catalysts.event: Open two to four new restaurants
catalysts.sentence: We also plan to open an additional two to four new restaurants in 2025.

Pursuant to the procedures set forth in the Nasdaq Listing Rule 5800 series, we appealed Nasdaq's determination to a Hearings Panel (the Panel) and a hearing request has stayed the suspension of the Company's securities and the filing of the Form 25-NSE pending the Panel's decision after a hearing scheduled for April 1, 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Restaurant industry sales in 2024 were over $1.1 trillion and forecast to grow to $1.5 trillion in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the National Restaurant Association (the NRA), restaurant industry sales in 2024 were over $1.1 trillion, up from $1.0 trillion in 2024 and is forecast to grow to $1.5 trillion in 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Full-service restaurant sales in 2024 were approximately $353 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: We primarily compete with other full-service restaurants, which, according to the NRA, had approximately $353 billion of sales in calendar year 2024, up from $324 billion in 2023.

tamClaims.claim: Limited-service segment sales in 2024 were approximately $421 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: The limited-service segment generated approximately $421 billion in calendar year 2024, or a roughly $26 billion increase from the prior year.
